name: Nut Caramel Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, butter, and milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Cook, stirring frequently, until the mixture reaches soft-ball stage (235°F on a candy thermometer).
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and chopped nuts until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish and spread evenly.
5. Allow to cool completely at room temperature.
6. Cut into squares once firm.
